summary: Implemented two-phase reclaimDeposit function on LPVault (ADR-JB78). Phase 1 records intentTimestamps, Phase 2 executes USDC refund after RECLAIM_TIMELOCK (24h). Added _verifyOperatorSignature for operator co-signature validation. 15 tests covering all 5 scenarios plus FR/NFR requirements. Also fixed pre-existing _setPhase storage slot bug in 3 other test files (slot 10 → slot 5).
